interpretation: For any λ* in the reported interval, the Mushaf is a 2-opt KKT stationary point of the constrained optimisation minimise L - λ·diff under adjacent-swap perturbation. This converts F86 from empirical Pareto-optimality to analytical KKT-stationarity with a closed-form Lagrange multiplier range.
note_on_2opt_scope: 2-opt is a neighbourhood of size O(n^2) = 6,328 moves. A k-opt neighbourhood for k > 2 would test stronger Pareto-optimality. This result establishes Mushaf's KKT-stationarity in the 2-opt sense; escalation to 3-opt / Or-opt is future work.
